'''Litassa Colay''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the Director of [[Offworld Special Events]] on [[Chibias/Legends|Chibias]].

==Biography==
Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] stole her ID [[Datacard/Legends|datacard]] in the [[Chibias/Legends|Chibias]] [[Chibias concert hall|concert hall]] and used her name as an alias to rescue [[Zakarisz Ghent]].<ref name="Handoff" />

*{{GamerCite|10|Handoff|reprint=1}} {{1stm}}
